channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Future of AI Personas: Balancing Potential and Challenges
item.description: The evolution of AI personas and agentic AI presents both opportunities and challenges for businesses, requiring a balance between technological advancement and ethical considerations.
item.dc:creator: Faisal Hoque, Fast Company

item.title: Top Apple exec concedes he had doubts about app store fees imposed on alternative payment options
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Longtime Apple executive Phil Schiller on Monday conceded he initially opposed fees that the iPhone maker charges for in app-transactions processed outside its own payment system because he feared violating a court-ordered mandate designed to create more competition.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Elizabeth Holmes fails to overturn her Theranos fraud conviction
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Elizabeth Holmes, the disgraced founder of Theranos, will remain in prison after losing a bid Monday to overturn her fraud conviction, with a federal appeals court saying she hadn’t proved there were legal missteps during her trial for defrauding investors with false claims of w
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Federal News Network’s DoD Modernization Exchange 2025
item.description: Hear from top Defense and industry leaders on the latest tech, strategy and innovation shaping DoD modernization The post Federal News Network’s DoD Modernization Exchange 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Apple announces $500 billion investment in US amid tariff threats that could affect the iPhone
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Apple announced Monday that it plans to invest more than $500 billion in the United States over the next four years, including plans to hire 20,000 people and build a new server factory in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: SEC ends investigation into Robinhood's crypto arm
item.description: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has closed its investigation into the cryptocurrency arm of Robinhood without taking action against the online brokerage, the company announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Fraudsters seem to target Seagate hard drives in order to pass old, used HDDs as new ones using intricate techniques
item.description: Fraudsters exploit Seagate hard drives, resetting SMART data to pass off heavily used HDDs as brand new.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How ‘lore’ became the internet’s favorite way to overshare
item.description: Lore isn’t just for games like The Elder Scrolls or films like The Lord of the Rings—online, it has evolved into something entirely new. The Old English word made the shortlist for Oxford University Presss’ 2024 Word of the Year (though it ultimately lost to brain rot).
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft set to rival Google, IBM with first-of-its-kind quantum chip with topological core architecture
item.description: Microsoft has unveiled Majorana 1, a quantum chip with a Topological Core architecture, paving the way for a one-million-qubit quantum processor.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: The best apps to find new books
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. Subscribe here. Books offer a compelling, slower alternative to the onslaught of negative news.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: Líderes de TI, ejecuten estas tres acciones en 2025, según PwC
item.description: “Es un gran momento para ser un CIO con talento”, afirma Dallas Dolen, director de la práctica de Tecnología de PwC.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Los robots humanoides con IA se abren camino hacia el mercado laboral
item.description: Los robots humanoides basados en inteligencia artificial (IA) podrían convertirse pronto en una realidad laboral, gracias a los avances paralelos en IA generativa y en componentes electromecánicos y mecatrónicos, que permiten a los robots tener habilidades de razonamiento y capacidades físicas que s
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Musk: Federal workers who gave 'good responses' to new policy deserve promotion consideration
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk said he’s encouraged by the “good responses” he’s received so far to an email asking federal employees to detail their recent work efforts and suggested the employees who sent them be considered for promotion. “A large number of good responses have been received already.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: The next wave of AI is here: Autonomous AI agents are amazing—and scary
item.description: The relentless hype around AI makes it difficult to separate the signal from the noise. So it’s understandable if you’ve tuned out recent talk about autonomous AI agents. A word of advice: Don’t. The significance of agentic AI may actually exceed the hype.
item.dc:creator: Tom Barnett, Fast Company

item.title: Brazil Supreme Court justice orders Rumble suspension nationwide for alleged non-compliance
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — A Brazilian Supreme Court justice on Friday ordered the suspension of video-sharing platform Rumble in the South American nation for allegedly refusing to comply with court orders.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Is your phone listening to everything you say? It’s complicated
item.description: Google, Instagram, Facebook and weather apps can track your location and use that data to serve you ads; here's what you can do to protect your privacy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sweden is investigating a damaged cable in the Baltic Sea
item.description: STOCKHOLM (AP) — Swedish authorities said on Friday they were investigating a damaged cable that was discovered in the Baltic Sea, the latest in a string of recent incidents of ruptured undersea cables that have heightened fears of Russian sabotage and spying in the region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Apple drops encryption feature for UK users after government reportedly demanded backdoor access
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple said Friday it will stop offering an advanced data security option for British users after the government reportedly demanded that the company provide backdoor access for any data those users have stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: No, Apple and Meta aren’t making humanoid robots
item.description: Tech press-landi and the tech blogosphere were abuzz last week with news that both Apple, the company that makes the iPhone, and Meta, the company that makes everybody on Facebook confront a daily flood of horrible AI-generated slop, are making full-size, humanoid robots.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: OSINT Unveiled: The Technology Behind the Intelligence – ODNI Edition
item.description: Learn how OSINT is shaping the future of intelligence and security. The post OSINT Unveiled: The Technology Behind the Intelligence – ODNI Edition first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Google’s new AI co-scientist aims to speed up the scientific discovery process
item.description: Google has unveiled an AI co-scientist built on its Gemini 2.0 platform, aiming to accelerate scientific research by generating novel hypotheses and refining experiments. While the system shows promise, questions remain about its performance and broader applicability.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Humanoid robots bust dance moves alongside humans
item.description: Unitree H1 robots dance at gala, blending AI and tradition. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson examines the convergence of cutting-edge technology and traditional culture.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A top Chinese official tours Thai-Myanmar border to highlight crackdown on scam centers
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Efforts to shut down online scam centers in Myanmar appeared to gain momentum on Monday as a top Chinese security official visited both sides of the Thai-Myanmar border ahead of expected large-scale repatriations of workers in the illicit industry.
item.dc:creator: JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
